# PERF-74 negative: Select clause projects only the needed columns
lang: go
file: PERF-074-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Name string
}

func ListUsers(c echo.Context, db *gorm.DB) error {
	var users []User
	db.Select("id, name").Find(&users)
	return c.String(200, "ok")
}
